name: AIBOM: --validate runs the emitted JSON through a bundled CycloneDX 1.6 schema validator; non-conformant SBOMs fail
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --validate compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && echo ok 1>&2
